title: Who might run against Ryan McMahon for Onondaga County executive? Democrats eye 2027
summary: Article reports on potential Democratic challengers to incumbent Republican County Executive Ryan McMahon in the 2027 election, with Onondaga County Comptroller Marty Masterpole among those considering a run. This is a county-level political story with limited direct relevance to City of Syracuse CIO operations.

political_signal.description: Democratic Party exploring candidates to challenge incumbent Republican county executive in 2027 election.

processing_notes: Article concerns county-level politics, not City of Syracuse government operations
No direct CIO/digital services implications identified
Relevant only for intergovernmental awareness and relationship management
